dispute.buyer_narrative: The leather jacket I received is dark grey. The listing shows brown leather. This is a clear misrepresentation. I have photos of what I received next to the listing photo.
dispute.seller_narrative: The jacket IS brown — it photographs differently under different lighting conditions. Leather color perception varies widely. This is the same jacket from the listing. No refund is warranted.

observations: Jacket appears grey-charcoal in this lighting
